title: [codereview-pass2] docs/bench-operations.md:250 cross-ref should use bd show link format
description:
Use consistent ◐ project-LICHEN-2nnd.3 · Logistics: Node distribution and recovery   [● P3 · IN_PROGRESS]
Owner: Mark Atwood · Assignee: ec2-user · Type: task
Created: 2026-07-16 · Started: 2026-07-22 · Updated: 2026-07-22
Lease: expires in 3 mins (heartbeat 1 min ago)

DESCRIPTION

  Plan for distributing 500 nodes and (optionally) recovering them.           
                                                                              
  ## Distribution models                                                      
                                                                              
  ### Option A: Sell at cost                                                  
                                                                              
  • $50-60/unit at booth                                                      
  • Attendee keeps node                                                       
  • No recovery needed                                                        
  • Simple, clean                                                             
                                                                              
  ### Option B: Deposit/return                                                
                                                                              
  • $20 deposit, return for refund                                            
  • Recover ~80% of nodes                                                     
  • More complex logistics                                                    
  • Lower attendee commitment                                                 
                                                                              
  ### Option C: Free loan                                                     
                                                                              
  • Hand out free, ask to return                                              
  • Recover ~50%?                                                             
  • Budget for loss                                                           
  • Maximum participation                                                     
                                                                              
  ## Recommendation                                                           
                                                                              
  Option A (sell at cost) for first demo:                                     
                                                                              
  • Simplest logistics                                                        
  • Attendees invested (literally)                                            
  • No return tracking                                                        
  • Revenue covers costs                                                      
                                                                              
  ## Distribution logistics                                                   
                                                                              
  • Booth with payment (Square/cash)                                          
  • Printed quick-start card in box                                           
  • QR code to join mesh / see viz                                            
  • Sticker: 'I survived the LICHEN mesh'                                     
                                                                              
  ## Post-event                                                               
                                                                              
  • Attendees keep nodes, join local meshes                                   
  • Builds community, not just demo                                           
  • Future: nodes report back, global map?                                    



LABELS: demo, logistics, milestone, scalability

PARENT
  ↑ ✓ project-LICHEN-2nnd: Demo: 500-node mesh at hacker conferences ● P2 reference. P4 treated as work.
